title: Use This HACK To Get More Subscribers!

transcript.text: Community posts are quietly pulling in new viewers while [music] you sleep. But, here's the problem. A viewer is not a subscriber. You [music] still need to get them to actually hit that button. So, what I want you to do is open up a new tab and go to your YouTube channel home page. Look at the URL in the address bar. Now, here's where things get a little interesting. We're going to add a tiny piece of code to the end of that URL. [music] Just type this exactly as you see it on screen now. Now, watch what happens when I refresh the page. It triggers an instant subscribe pop-up when the page reloads. [music] So, instead of viewers landing on your channel page and maybe remembering to subscribe at some point, they're immediately prompted to do so.
